0: Zero This means that during these periods a person enters the most difficult stretch of life. They will be in deep need of support from friends and loved ones. They will often feel apathy and melancholy, with depression not far away. Constant setbacks and the proverbial run of bad luck. The Graph of Destiny Zero also points to the need to work off karmic debts. This is a time of reassessing values and atoning for past wrongs.
1: The number One indicates that a period of rising fortune is beginning in your life after the hardships you have endured. But luck will not come from outside — you can rely on yourself alone. If you manage to overcome bouts of self-dissatisfaction, switch on your diligence, and strive for success, it will come. Even so, this period is fairly challenging.
2: Two Pakhom explained what to do when money is not flowing your way. The number Two also points to an upswing. The path to success will be hard and slow, but steady. "Slow and steady wins the race" — this is the motto for the years that fall under the influence of the Two. It is wise to stock up on calm and learn to take any difficulty philosophically. The Two is valuable because it gives you the chance to keep watch over and notice in time any negativity entering your life. Thanks to this quality, you can extinguish all that is bad in good time and open yourself to all that is good.
3:
Three This period is fairly difficult, but there is already hope of success. Usually during this time a person's convictions and views undergo serious change. The position you hold in society will be rather shaky and unreliable. You will have to show remarkable resourcefulness.
The positive side: in the years of the Three, many new friends usually appear — it is an excellent time for building business connections as well.
4: Four This is a time of constancy. In the years of the Four a person is able to settle into their habits and convictions. At last they begin to take a worthy place in society, desire no change, and feel content both in their personal life and in their work affairs. The Graph of Destiny by Date of Birth But if a year of the Four follows a "strong" year (8–9), this signals the onset of a period of uncertainty in oneself and one's powers. There will be less energy.
5:
Five is a very fortunate yet extremely unpredictable number. It is the embodiment of risk and of unforeseen, astonishing events in life.
Life under the influence of the Five resembles a lottery in which you can either hit the jackpot or be left with nothing at all. Important: if a year of the Five follows a lower year (1–4), then most likely a person will meet their true love. Things are worse if the Five arrives after a higher year (6–9). Then you should expect discord in the family. Quarrels and conflicts are likely, which may even end in separation.
6: Six An extremely favorable time, when a person feels complete harmony and happiness. Everything in life will unfold smoothly and evenly. Stability will come to both personal and business relationships. There will be no need to worry about a shortage of money. Not interested in this topic Product purchased or service found Violates the law What is especially important: during this period you should set goals that do not conflict with your personal boundaries and moral principles.
7: Seven The years of the Seven are the most favorable period for devoting time to the spiritual side of life. You can take up spiritual practices, self-development, and meditation. More down-to-earth people may turn to scholarly work or research. This is also a suitable time for forming new relationships.
8: Eight A time of success. Luck will accompany you in literally everything — money will come of its own accord and in large amounts, goals will prove easy to realize, and encounters with the opposite sex will stop being disappointing.
9: Nine A time of dreams — the ideal period for self-realization, for fulfilling long-held wishes and achieving your goals. These are the years when a person is able to reach the peak of their success and reap the fruits of the efforts made earlier.
